title: post api auth register valid user
description: Test user registration with valid username, password, and optional email to receive 201 response with access token and user details.

title: post api auth login valid credentials
description: Test user login with valid username and password to receive 200 response with JWT token payload.

title: get api auth me authenticated user
description: Test retrieval of current authenticated user profile with valid Bearer token to receive 200 response with user info.

title: post api auth forgot password unknown user
description: Test forgot password request with unknown username to receive 404 user not found error.

title: post api auth reset password invalid token
description: Test password reset with expired or invalid reset token or short new password to receive 400 validation error.

title: get api profiles list owned profiles
description: Test listing all profiles belonging to authenticated user to receive 200 response with profile list.

title: patch api profiles update top level fields
description: Test updating top-level profile fields with partial data to receive 200 response with updated profile info.

title: delete api profiles delete profile
description: Test deleting a profile and all its children with valid authentication to receive 204 no content response.

title: post api import upload resume file
description: Test uploading a supported resume file to create a new profile and receive 201 response with profile id and warnings.

title: get api profiles export supported format
description: Test exporting a profile in a supported format with valid authentication to receive 200 binary file download.
